feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition error message for increase the maximum material number 18 to 40
entry.content:
Hello,

I’m currently working on a project in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition   and I need clarification.

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, within the mainline CBC, I am unable to complete the configuration “Define Output Format of Material Numbers” (102320).


My objective is to increase the maximum material number length from 18 to 40 characters, but an error message is displayed (see attached screenshot).

However, SAP documentation clearly states that:

“When the material number length is set, both the Material Number and Old Material Number fields are set with the same length. However, the old material number field retains the highest length ever configured. For example, if the material number length is set to 40 characters and then reduced to 18 characters, the Old Material Number field remains at 40 characters.”
(SAP Note 2696446)

Could you please investigate and help resolve this issue?

I look forward to your feedback.

Thank you in advance.

Kind regards,

entry.title: Encountered a permission error while creating Fixed asset Master data in data migration
entry.content:
An authorization error occurs during the simulation step of fixed asset data migration in the Migrate Your Data app.

Error message: "You don't have authorization for company code XXXX, asset class YYYYYYYY."


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to set up combine Multiple Sales Schedule Agreement as one Delivery Order
entry.content:
1.I create 2 Sales Schedule Agreements with the same Customer, Material and Schedule Line Date

2.When I use app : Create Outbound Delivery with Order Reference 

I can combine multiple Sales Schedule Agreements into one Delivery Order 

3.But when I use app : Sales Order Schedule Lines

I can't combine multiple Sales Schedule Agreements into one Delivery Order 

 

I also check SAP Note : 3393805 - Not authorized to use transaction VL10CUA VL10CUV 

but still not found the solution yet.

 

and Customer is already flagged for the "Order Combination" in the Customer Master Data

 

Could you please help or suggest how to set up a combined Multiple Sales Schedule Agreement as one Delivery Order?

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Public Cloud App Create Advance Return on Sales/Purchase Tax
entry.content: What are the steps involved in generating NL specific files in the Create Advance Return on Sales/Purchase Tax app?

entry.title: Best Practices for Mining Industry - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently working on an SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud project and looking for any available best practices related to the Mining industry.

I would appreciate it if you could share relevant resources, experiences, or recommendations.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: PO net amount not shown in order currency in monitor purchase order item FIORI app
entry.content:
Dear All,

Using Monitor purchase order item FIORI app, Purchase order net amount and other amounts are shown in Display currency entered as a part of selection parameter.

We need Purchase order net amount to be displayed in order currency corresponding to each PO in monitor purchase order item FIORI app

Kindly let us know is it possible

Regards

Suddy

entry.content:

entry.title: workflow for manage recurring journal entries
entry.content: need to know the process for workflow for manage recurring journal entries in public cloud

entry.title: How to set up combine Multiple Sales Schedule Agreement as one Delivery Order
entry.content:
1. I create 2 Sales Schedule Agreements with the same Customer, Material and Schedule Line Date

2. When I use app : Create Outbound Delivery with Order Reference 

I can combine multiple Sales Schedule Agreements into one Delivery Order 

3. But when I use app : Sales Order Schedule Lines

I can't combine multiple Sales Schedule Agreements into one Delivery Order and Customer is already flagged for the "Order Combination" in the Customer Master Data

Could you please help or suggest how to set up a combined Multiple Sales Schedule Agreement as one Delivery Order?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Archive in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
HI, Dears
According to our system's license analysis, the following actions are recommended in priority order.
Could you please provide guidance on how to implement these actions or archive data in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 
#Archive Data
SAP Information Lifecycle Management 

Thanks

entry.title: [S/4 HANA Public Cloud] eDocuments created for Peppol customer invoiced with other company code
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

 

Because Peppol is currently not cross border, only BE to BE should be sent over the Peppol network or DE to DE, not DE to BE.

In the schedule edocument jobs we setup a job to submit the e-invoices automatically, this will then also submit the invoices from DE  to BE customer A which we don't want.

How can we prevent this? 

 

Thanks.

Best regards

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: how to setup automatic invoices from edocument cockpit
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have implemented KSEF and working currently manually for sending invoices downloading xml format in e document cockpit and uploading them into ksef protal.

However, now that we wanted to make it automatic into e document cockpit for incoming and outgoing invoices what could be approach and process to make it automated we are using sap 2sl landscape in public cloud

entry.title: Manage Sales Contract Version 2 app - Custom Field
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have added a new custom field in the Manage Sales Contract – Version 2 app; however, I am unable to find an option to make the field non‑editable. Could you please assist me in setting this field to read‑only?

entry.title: 3XK In-House Repair – Spare Parts Consumption Timing & Reservation Behaviour
entry.content:
Hi all,

I’m testing 3XK – In-House Repair in SAP S/4HANA Cloud with spare parts managed in a warehouse.

I noticed that goods movement for spare parts is only posted at service confirmation, which also completes the repair order.

In our scenario, warehouse and service teams are separate, and parts are physically issued before repair. However, the system does not provide a step to confirm receipt before consumption.

Also, although a reservation is created, it’s unclear whether it protects stock from other demands (e.g. sales orders).

Questions:

  1. Is this the expected standard behaviour for 3XK?
  2. Is there any standard way to separate goods issue from service confirmation or add a receipt/confirmation step?
  3. Does the reservation provide any priority or protection for service orders?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Requirement of purchasing document in Manage supplier Line item
entry.content:
Dear Expert ,

This incident is with reference of incident no :- 293084/2026 Updated on 18.03.2026 where we have asked replicating purchasing document number in Manage Supplier Line item which as per SAP is not possible. But our client is not accepting this resolution that you have discarded this option. Please let us know how we can fetch purchasing Document in Manage Supplier Line Item. Refer to the attachment.

Regards,

Shatabdi

entry.title: How to dynamically determine Warehouse Source Storage Type by Customer for the same material code
entry.content:
Hi

A single material code is being sold to multiple customers (A, B, C).

We want to store and pick this material from separate Storage Types assigned to each customer (e.g., ST_A, ST_B, ST_C).

However, only one Stock Removal Control Indicator can be set in the Material Master.

In this case, is there a way to dynamically determine the source storage type and bin when a Warehouse Order is created based on an Outbound Delivery?

For example, can we ensure that the source storage type and bin are determined as "ST_A" for Customer A, and "ST_B" for Customer B?

entry.title: SAP Document AI – Quality Certificate processed successfully but Certificate Receipt remains in “Exp
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

 

I am working on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition scenario
“AI-assisted processing of incoming supplier quality certificates with SAP Document AI”.

 

Current setup:
- AI Units are procured
- Business catalog QM – Incoming Quality Certificates (SAP_QM_BC_INCG_QLTY_CERT_PC) is assigned
- Scope item 7TC (Integration with SAP Document AI) is activated
- SAP Document AI tenant is accessible
- Certificate Receipt is created automatically at Goods Receipt with status = Expected

 

What I have done:
1. Posted Goods Receipt – Certificate Receipt created in Manage Certificate Receipts (F3233) with status Expected
2. Uploaded the supplier quality certificate PDF in SAP Document AI using:
   - Document Type: Custom
   - Schema: SAP_OCROnly_schema
3. Document AI processing completes successfully and shows status = Done

 

Issue:
Even after successful processing in SAP Document AI, the Certificate Receipt in SAP S/4HANA Cloud remains in “Expected” status and is not automatically updated to “Received”.
The document is not automatically attached to the Certificate Receipt.

 

Questions:
1. Is automatic update of Certificate Receipt (Expected → Received) the expected behavior in this scenario?
2. Is manual confirmation in Manage Certificate Receipts (F3233) the standard SAP-supported fallback if automatic matching does not occur?
3. Does the automatic update require uploading the document specifically via the app “Upload Quality Certificate Documents (F8858)” instead of uploading through the SAP Document AI portal?
4. If the “Upload Quality Certificate Documents (F8858)” app is used and it is not available in the SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library, how can access to this app be obtained in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
5.  Are there any additional configuration or prerequisites required to enable automatic linkage between SAP Document AI and Certificate Receipts?

 

Looking for confirmation from experts who have implemented or tested this scenario.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Romanian DSPL 394 – XML Errors
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am working with the Romanian report “Statement 394 (DSPL)” and I am getting this error in the XML file, which I haven’t been able to fix:

<op1 tip="AI" tip_partener="2" ... />

It seems that SAP is marking the partner as tip_partener = 2, and ANAF rejects operations A and AI. Therefore, this is invalid for ANAF.

And another error with this block with this code:

<rezumat1 tip_partener="2" cota="21" facturiA="1" facturiAI="1" ... />

If tip_partener = 2, there cannot be facturiA or facturiAI.

From what I have checked, the issue seems to be in the Business Partner master data, because SAP continues classifying the Business Partner as a natural person.

I have reviewed the Business Partner and it has:

  • Country = RO
  • BP is marked as Organization
  • The tax identification seems correct: RO13279412

    Could you please help me?

    I am attaching the XML of the Romanian 394 report generated by the system.

    Thank you!

entry.title: GSTR6 - No items to report;Query DOC_SEL did not return any data
entry.content:
We create a new run for Goods and Service Tax Return 6 (GSTR 6) report but after successful run of task no attachments are generating.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Order A2X OData V4 — Does a deep insert POST roll back entirely if one line item fails?
entry.content: When creating a sales order with header and line items in a single deep insert POST using the Sales Order (A2X) OData V4 API, what is the default behavior if one line item fails validation — is the entire request rolled back (all or nothing), or can the header be saved with the valid items? Is this behavior configurable without a BAdI? Communication scenario SAP_COM_0109
